activities.title: Build Codex Request Body
activities.description: Construct the Responses API request body (instructions, input, store, reasoning, include, tools, prompt_cache_key) from provider call inputs and provider options

activities.title: Stream Codex Response Frames
activities.description: Open WebSocket to chatgpt.com codex responses endpoint; transmit body; receive frames; track frameCount and terminalEventReceived; on premature close invoke classifier; on retry decision reopen connection once

activities.title: Translate SSE Events Into Stream Parts
activities.description: Map incoming codex SSE events into LanguageModelV2StreamPart sequence; accumulate emittedTextDeltas counter; in flush block detect empty turn and call classifier; emit finish part with classification metadata when present

activities.title: Classify Empty Turn Cause
activities.description: Pure-function classifier mapping observed stream state and request options shape into one of {ws_truncation, ws_no_frames, server_empty_output_with_reasoning, server_incomplete, server_failed, unclassified}; selects a non-blocking recovery action; returns suspectParams flagged for D-3 audit

activities.title: Persist Empty Turn Forensic Evidence
activities.description: Append one JSON line per classification to empty-turns.jsonl under XDG_STATE_HOME; mirror payload to bus channel codex.emptyTurn; swallow log failures with console.error breadcrumb so recovery never stalls on logging

activities.title: Augment Runloop Nudge With Classification
activities.description: Existing empty-response guard receives finish part with providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification; fires the broad question-mark nudge per Decision D-4 (no narrowing); attaches classification metadata to the synthetic nudge message for forensic correlation

arrows.label: WebSocket connection to chatgpt.com codex responses endpoint
wsState snapshot (frameCount, terminalEventReceived, wsCloseCode) on premature close
streamStateSnapshot (finishReason, deltasObserved, openTextId, usage) on flush when empty
classification result drives finishReason and providerMetadata payload
LanguageModelV2StreamPart sequence (text-delta, tool-call, finish) to AI SDK runloop
classification payload {causeFamily, recoveryAction, suspectParams, logSequence, snapshots}
existing empty-response guard logic (broad nudge per D-4)
synthetic question-mark message with classification metadata attached
